SERVICES.TITLE: Services
SERVICES.SUBTITLE: Manage price list for examinations and consultations

DESCRIPTION.CARDIOLOGY_EXAM: Comprehensive cardiac examination including ECG, blood pressure measurement, and risk assessment.
DESCRIPTION.DENTAL_CHECKUP: Thorough dental checkup with oral health evaluation and personalized care recommendations.
DESCRIPTION.PSYCHIATRY_CONSULT: In-depth psychiatric consultation to assess mental health and provide tailored treatment plans.
DESCRIPTION.DERMATOLOGY_SCREENING: Full-body skin examination for early detection of skin conditions and cancers.
DESCRIPTION.ORTHOPEDICS_EXAM: Detailed orthopedic examination to evaluate musculoskeletal health and mobility.
DESCRIPTION.OPHTHALMOLOGY_EXAM: Comprehensive eye examination including vision testing and ocular health assessment.
DESCRIPTION.UROLOGY_SCREENING: Complete urological screening for early detection of urinary tract issues and prostate health.
DESCRIPTION.GYNECOLOGY_SCREENING: Thorough gynecological screening including Pap smear, HPV testing, and breast examination.
DESCRIPTION.GYNECOLOGY_EXAM_LONG: Comprehensive gynecological examination including pelvic ultrasound, hormonal assessment, and fertility counseling.
DESCRIPTION.DENTAL_SCALING: Professional dental scaling to remove plaque and tartar buildup for improved oral health.
DESCRIPTION.DENTAL_FILLING: High-quality dental filling service to restore tooth function and aesthetics.
DESCRIPTION.VISION_TEST: Accurate vision testing to determine prescription needs and detect eye conditions.
DESCRIPTION.JOINT_INJECTION: Therapeutic joint injection for pain relief and improved mobility in arthritic conditions.
DESCRIPTION.POSTOP_CONTROL: Post-operative control examination to monitor healing progress and address any complications.
DESCRIPTION.DIGITAL_DERMOSCOPY_AND_MOLE_MAPPING: Advanced digital dermoscopy and mole mapping for early detection of skin abnormalities and personalized monitoring.
